name: Honey Curried Chicken
recipeIngredient: 3 tsp Curry powder or garam masala
1 tsp Ginger grated or finely chopped
1 each Salt and pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. In an oiled Baking Dish, arrange chicken skin side down.
2. Combine all other ingredients and stir until smooth.
3. Pour over chicken and refrigerate 1 hour (or more if you wish).
4. Drain into cup excess sauce and bake chicken, uncovered in 375 degree oven for 20 minutes.
5. Turn chicken over and baste with remaining sauce, bake chicken another 20-30 minutes or until tender and no pink remains, basting periodically.
6. Serve with anything - rice, noodles, or baked potatoe.
